annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under N.Y. C.P.L.R. 5004 — 9% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from New York’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
